settings.sg_title_after: built for creators who value quality.

settings.editor: Book ready-to-use podcast, photography, and video studios by the hour, day, or project. Premium lighting, full kit, zero setup — just walk in and create.
Each space is meticulously designed and fully equipped. Walk in, plug in, create — we handle the rest.
Cyclorama walls, Profoto lighting, and seamless backdrops for editorial shoots.
Soundproofed rooms with broadcast-grade mics, mixers, and warm acoustic design.
Cinema-grade lighting grid, dolly tracks, and a production-ready cyc wall.
Private meeting space for team sessions, client discussions, and workshops.
Open natural-light loft for events, workshops, brand activations, and more.
Ring lights, vertical setups, and props built for short-form creators.
Our flagship spaces designed for demanding productions. Every detail engineered for creative excellence.
Our most sought-after space featuring a 40-foot cyclorama wall, ceiling-mounted Profoto lighting rig, and dedicated styling area. Designed for high-end editorial, fashion, and commercial shoots.

A fully sound-treated production environment with motorised lighting grid, built-in green screen capabilities, and direct equipment loading bay. Purpose-built for commercial video and film production.

settings.sg_icon_description: Filter by studio type, size, location, and available amenities to find your perfect creative space.
Select hourly, half-day, or full-day slots. Real-time availability so you always know what's open.
Secure your booking instantly with our streamlined checkout. No hidden fees, no surprises.
Walk in and start creating. Everything is set up, cleaned, and ready for your session.

settings.editor: We offer project-based packages and monthly memberships for creators and agencies who need consistent access.
Stuvia replaced our home office shoots overnight. The lighting alone elevated our brand to a level we couldn't reach on our own.
I record three podcasts a week here. Walk in, sit down, hit record. The acoustic treatment is genuinely studio-grade.
The team treats every booking like a real production. It's the difference between a rental and a creative partner.
Best for short shoots, pickups, and quick podcast sessions.
Ideal for full content sessions, brand shoots, and interviews.
For ambitious productions, multi-look shoots, and team days.
